SubjectConfiguration._description: Defines subject-level physiological variability, i.e., MU Pool properties.

MovementConfiguration._description: Describes the prescribed movement scenario for the synthetic trial. Effort and angle profiles are generated based on the parameters provided, and can be used to generate Trapezoid, Triangular, Sinusoid, or Ballistic contractions.

RecordingConfiguration._description: Describes the signal processing and acquisition environment.

ElectrodeConfiguration._description: Electrode array layout and spacing in the MUAP simulator (BioMime) is fixed at 10 x 32, 8mm i.e.d. DesiredNCols sets the number of columns retained after EMG generation, based on mean activity of the column.

FilterProperties._description: Settings for high-pass filtering the simulated EMG signal.
